TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Sakizaya, story: skzyNr-class_sinay
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: ci Sinay ku angnan aku tu nu pangcah.
S.PHON: ʦi sinaj ku aŋnan aku tu nu paŋʦaħ.
S.FORM: ci Sinay ku angnan aku tu nu pangcah.
S.PHON: ʦi sinaj ku aŋnan aku tu nu paŋʦaħ.
S.TRANSL: 我阿美族名字叫做Sinay.
My Amis name is Sinay.

S.FORM: pakaini i Maibul kuyni u ma kamu nu maku u canan a sa.
S.PHON: pakaini i maibur~ɾ kujni u ma kamu nu maku u ʦanan a sa.
S.FORM: pakaini i Maibul kuyni u ma kamu nu maku u canan a sa.
S.PHON: pakaini i maibur~ɾ kujni u ma kamu nu maku u ʦanan a sa.
S.TRANSL: 要講的是馬立雲的事.
What I am going to talk about is about Maibul.

S.FORM: i pakainiay i sapunis mamin satu milangec tuyuni palalud.
S.PHON: i pakainiaj i sapunis mamin satu mir~ɾaŋəʦ tujuni par~ɾar~ɾud.
S.FORM: i pakainiay i sapunis mamin satu milangec tuyuni palalud.
S.PHON: i pakainiaj i sapunis mamin satu mir~ɾaŋəʦ tujuni par~ɾar~ɾud.
S.TRANSL: 捕鳥祭是在夏天收割之後.
The hunting festival started after harvest in summer.

S.FORM: paaniptu tuyu u nipasaba i pituay a bulad.
S.PHON: paaniptu tuju u nipasaba i pituaj a bur~ɾad.
S.FORM: paaniptu tuyu u nipasaba i pituay a bulad.
S.PHON: paaniptu tuju u nipasaba i pituaj a bur~ɾad.
S.TRANSL: 在七月插第二期的秧.
People transplanted the second-season rice seedlings in July.

S.FORM: mamin satu miniwanyu kya.
S.PHON: mamin satu miniwanju kja.
S.FORM: mamin satu miniwanyu kya.
S.PHON: mamin satu miniwanju kja.
S.TRANSL: 用手除草.
weeded.

S.FORM: masabalucu'tu nuyni u babalaki atu u kapah kuyni u sakalimulak tuyni u misapunis.
S.PHON: masabar~ɾuʦuʔ~ʡtu nujni u babar~ɾaki atu u kapaħ kujni u sakar~ɾimur~ɾak tujni u misapunis.
S.FORM: masabalucu'tu nuyni u babalaki atu u kapah kuyni u sakalimulak tuyni u misapunis.
S.PHON: masabar~ɾuʦuʔ~ʡtu nujni u babar~ɾaki atu u kapaħ kujni u sakar~ɾimur~ɾak tujni u misapunis.
S.TRANSL: 老人家決定要和年輕人慶祝這個捕鳥季的慶典.
The senior citizens decided to celebrate hunting festival with young people.

S.FORM: sisa tatenga' izawtu kuyni u kamu nu babalaki nikasaupu.
S.PHON: sisa tatəŋaʔ~ʡ izawtu kujni u kamu nu babar~ɾaki nikasaupu.
S.FORM: sisa tatenga' izawtu kuyni u kamu nu babalaki nikasaupu.
S.PHON: sisa tatəŋaʔ~ʡ izawtu kujni u kamu nu babar~ɾaki nikasaupu.
S.TRANSL: 所以有老人在說要集合了.
Therefore, old people said it is time to gather together.

S.FORM: tuyni u maketuntu kuyni u kamu.
S.PHON: tujni u makətuntu kujni u kamu.
S.FORM: tuyni u maketuntu kuyni u kamu.
S.PHON: tujni u makətuntu kujni u kamu.
S.TRANSL: 這已經決定了.
This has been decided.

S.FORM: ayaan henay mihiya sapunis malingatu i sa izawtu.
S.PHON: ajaan ħənaj miħija sapunis mar~ɾiŋatu i sa izawtu.
S.FORM: ayaan henay mihiya sapunis malingatu i sa izawtu.
S.PHON: ajaan ħənaj miħija sapunis mar~ɾiŋatu i sa izawtu.
S.TRANSL: 捕鳥祭要何時開始?
When would the hunting festival start?

S.FORM: kuyu nipibihkac nu ni u pikilumaluma'an nuyni nu wawa tuyu tatamaan.
S.PHON: kuju nipibiħkaʦ nu ni u pikir~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡan nujni nu wawa tuju tatamaan.
S.FORM: kuyu nipibihkac nu ni u pikilumaluma'an nuyni nu wawa tuyu tatamaan.
S.PHON: kuju nipibiħkaʦ nu ni u pikir~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡan nujni nu wawa tuju tatamaan.
S.TRANSL: 家家戶戶的男孩都會射鳥.
Every boy would shoot birds.

S.FORM: mahizaay kiza u nu luluma' kuyni.
S.PHON: maħizaaj kiza u nu r~ɾur~ɾumaʔ~ʡ kujni.
S.FORM: mahizaay kiza u nu luluma' kuyni.
S.PHON: maħizaaj kiza u nu r~ɾur~ɾumaʔ~ʡ kujni.
S.TRANSL: 家庭的捕鳥祭就是這樣.
This is the hunting festival for family.

S.FORM: mibihkac satu nuyu kapulungan sa.
S.PHON: mibiħkaʦ satu nuju kapur~ɾuŋan sa.
S.FORM: mibihkac satu nuyu kapulungan sa.
S.PHON: mibiħkaʦ satu nuju kapur~ɾuŋan sa.
S.TRANSL: 捕鳥祭是大家的.
The hunting festival is for our tribe.

S.FORM: ahican anu cacay a demiad anu tusaay a demiad nayi ku wantan tuyni.
S.PHON: aħiʦan anu ʦaʦaj a dəmiad anu tusaaj a dəmiad naji ku wantan tujni.
S.FORM: ahican anu cacay a demiad anu tusaay a demiad nayi ku wantan tuyni.
S.PHON: aħiʦan anu ʦaʦaj a dəmiad anu tusaaj a dəmiad naji ku wantan tujni.
S.TRANSL: 不確定是一天或二天.
It was not clear whether it is one day or two days.

S.FORM: maketun anu tusa a demiad kuyu nipibihkac sa tusa a demiad.
S.PHON: makətun anu tusa a dəmiad kuju nipibiħkaʦ sa tusa a dəmiad.
S.FORM: maketun anu tusa a demiad kuyu nipibihkac sa tusa a demiad.
S.PHON: makətun anu tusa a dəmiad kuju nipibiħkaʦ sa tusa a dəmiad.
S.TRANSL: 決定要捕鳥二天就二天.
If it was decided for two days, it would be two days.

S.FORM: anu tuluan sa tulu a demiad a mahiza.
S.PHON: anu tur~ɾuan sa tur~ɾu a dəmiad a maħiza.
S.FORM: anu tuluan sa tulu a demiad a mahiza.
S.PHON: anu tur~ɾuan sa tur~ɾu a dəmiad a maħiza.
S.TRANSL: 說三天的話就是三天.
If it would be three days, it would be in this way.

S.FORM: saupu han ku ayam tuyza u kakalabian sa.
S.PHON: saupu ħan ku ajam tujza u kakar~ɾabian sa.
S.FORM: saupu han ku ayam tuyza u kakalabian sa.
S.PHON: saupu ħan ku ajam tujza u kakar~ɾabian sa.
S.TRANSL: 收集晚餐要吃的鳥.
collected birds for dinner.

S.FORM: tuduh han mamin mituduh sa singa' han henay kuyni sa.
S.PHON: tuduħ ħan mamin mituduħ sa siŋaʔ~ʡ ħan ħənaj kujni sa.
S.FORM: tuduh han mamin mituduh sa singa' han henay kuyni sa.
S.PHON: tuduħ ħan mamin mituduħ sa siŋaʔ~ʡ ħan ħənaj kujni sa.
S.TRANSL: 烤完之後擱置在一邊.
It was put aside after it was burned.

S.FORM: tawya hantu a demiad misapunis sa tatenga' malahuktu u yu u tunuz ku sakalahuk yu mahiza henay.
S.PHON: tawja ħantu a dəmiad misapunis sa tatəŋaʔ~ʡ mar~ɾaħuktu u ju u tunuz ku sakar~ɾaħuk ju maħiza ħənaj.
S.FORM: tawya hantu a demiad misapunis sa tatenga' malahuktu u yu u tunuz ku sakalahuk yu mahiza henay.
S.PHON: tawja ħantu a dəmiad misapunis sa tatəŋaʔ~ʡ mar~ɾaħuktu u ju u tunuz ku sakar~ɾaħuk ju maħiza ħənaj.
S.TRANSL: 到捕鳥季那一天,從前一定吃麻糬當作午餐.
When hunting festivals came, people ate rice cake as their lunch.

S.FORM: E pahalhalen nuyu tatayna a maduh.
S.PHON: ə paħar~ɾħar~ɾən nuju tatajna a maduħ.
S.FORM: E pahalhalen nuyu tatayna a maduh.
S.PHON: ə paħar~ɾħar~ɾən nuju tatajna a maduħ.
S.TRANSL: 女性在摏米.
Women were pounding.

S.FORM: mitelac sangelac kuyni u panay mahizaay kiza.
S.PHON: mitər~ɾaʦ saŋər~ɾaʦ kujni u panaj maħizaaj kiza.
S.FORM: mitelac sangelac kuyni u panay mahizaay kiza.
S.PHON: mitər~ɾaʦ saŋər~ɾaʦ kujni u panaj maħizaaj kiza.
S.TRANSL: 糯米就很白了.
Then the glutinous rice became white.

S.FORM: sahakhak hantu talik hantu mihiya mitalik nuyni u tatayna kuyza u tunuz sa uyzaay kuyu malusakalahuk.
S.PHON: saħakħak ħantu tar~ɾik ħantu miħija mitar~ɾik nujni u tatajna kujza u tunuz sa ujzaaj kuju mar~ɾusakar~ɾaħuk.
S.FORM: sahakhak hantu talik hantu mihiya mitalik nuyni u tatayna kuyza u tunuz sa uyzaay kuyu malusakalahuk.
S.PHON: saħakħak ħantu tar~ɾik ħantu miħija mitar~ɾik nujni u tatajna kujza u tunuz sa ujzaaj kuju mar~ɾusakar~ɾaħuk.
S.TRANSL: 女性煮糯米飯並將其把打成麻糬成午餐.
Women cooked glutinous rice and made it into rice cakes as lunch.

S.FORM: i tawya a demiad misapunis uyni hantu u ayam sa E tikulac ku nu tikulac.
S.PHON: i tawja a dəmiad misapunis ujni ħantu u ajam sa ə tikur~ɾaʦ ku nu tikur~ɾaʦ.
S.FORM: i tawya a demiad misapunis uyni hantu u ayam sa E tikulac ku nu tikulac.
S.PHON: i tawja a dəmiad misapunis ujni ħantu u ajam sa ə tikur~ɾaʦ ku nu tikur~ɾaʦ.
S.TRANSL: 捕鳥祭的那一天,雉雞的就放在雉雞這一堆.
On the day of hunting festival, birds like ring-necked pheasant would be put together.

S.FORM: anu tabaki heni sapela'en anu sangelac sa anu malasepad malaenem ku nipipela' ku nicikcik mihizaay kiza sa.
S.PHON: anu tabaki ħəni sapər~ɾaʔ~ʡən anu saŋər~ɾaʦ sa anu mar~ɾasəpad mar~ɾaənəm ku nipipər~ɾaʔ~ʡ ku niʦikʦik miħizaaj kiza sa.
S.FORM: anu tabaki heni sapela'en anu sangelac sa anu malasepad malaenem ku nipipela' ku nicikcik mihizaay kiza sa.
S.PHON: anu tabaki ħəni sapər~ɾaʔ~ʡən anu saŋər~ɾaʦ sa anu mar~ɾasəpad mar~ɾaənəm ku nipipər~ɾaʔ~ʡ ku niʦikʦik miħizaaj kiza sa.
S.TRANSL: 大的就切一切,不然就切成四份,切成六份.

TRANSL.notes: (We would) cut it if it was big, or cut it half, into four pieces or six pieces.

S.TRANSL: cut it if it was big, or cut it half, into four pieces or six pieces.

S.FORM: uyu Pulo' Pulo' sanaden kuyu nisalami'an mihizaay kiza u kabi ku kabi.
S.PHON: uju pur~ɾoʔ~ʡ pur~ɾoʔ~ʡ sanadən kuju nisar~ɾamiʔ~ʡan miħizaaj kiza u kabi ku kabi.
S.FORM: uyu Pulo' Pulo' sanaden kuyu nisalami'an mihizaay kiza u kabi ku kabi.
S.PHON: uju pur~ɾoʔ~ʡ pur~ɾoʔ~ʡ sanadən kuju nisar~ɾamiʔ~ʡan miħizaaj kiza u kabi ku kabi.
S.TRANSL: 鳥、煮的菜和湯分開放.

TRANSL.notes: (They) separate birds from the cooked vegetables and soup.

S.TRANSL: separate birds from the cooked vegetables and soup.

S.FORM: anu patahkal i wakung i yu u ayam u ayam han sa.
S.PHON: anu pataħkar~ɾ i wakuŋ i ju u ajam u ajam ħan sa.
S.FORM: anu patahkal i wakung i yu u ayam u ayam han sa.
S.PHON: anu pataħkar~ɾ i wakuŋ i ju u ajam u ajam ħan sa.
S.TRANSL: 用碗公裝鳥.

TRANSL.notes: (They) put birds in a big bowl.

S.TRANSL: put birds in a big bowl.

S.FORM: pakilac han kuyni u hiya u babalaki.
S.PHON: pakir~ɾaʦ ħan kujni u ħija u babar~ɾaki.
S.FORM: pakilac han kuyni u hiya u babalaki.
S.PHON: pakir~ɾaʦ ħan kujni u ħija u babar~ɾaki.
S.TRANSL: 就這樣分給老人家.

TRANSL.notes: (They) gave (birds) to senior citizens in this way.

S.TRANSL: gave to senior citizens in this way.

S.FORM: anu simatulu anu simalima.
S.PHON: anu simatur~ɾu anu simar~ɾima.
S.FORM: anu simatulu anu simalima.
S.PHON: anu simatur~ɾu anu simar~ɾima.
S.TRANSL: 分三個或五個給老人家.
Every senior citizens had three or five.

S.FORM: nayi' ku wantan nu i tawyaay u iza pibihkac.
S.PHON: najiʔ~ʡ ku wantan nu i tawjaaj u iza pibiħkaʦ.
S.FORM: nayi' ku wantan nu i tawyaay u iza pibihkac.
S.PHON: najiʔ~ʡ ku wantan nu i tawjaaj u iza pibiħkaʦ.
S.TRANSL: 那時候沒有一定分法.
It was uncertain how it was distributed.

S.FORM: nikaw izaw nu ayam kuyni u tapeng anu yadah ku ayam kya yadah kuyni u u kilac nu payteked.
S.PHON: nikaw izaw nu ajam kujni u tapəŋ anu jadaħ ku ajam kja jadaħ kujni u u kir~ɾaʦ nu pajtəkəd.
S.FORM: nikaw izaw nu ayam kuyni u tapeng anu yadah ku ayam kya yadah kuyni u u kilac nu payteked.
S.PHON: nikaw izaw nu ajam kujni u tapəŋ anu jadaħ ku ajam kja jadaħ kujni u u kir~ɾaʦ nu pajtəkəd.
S.TRANSL: 如果鳥很多的話,那分給每個人的也很多.
If there were many birds, every one could have more.

S.FORM: u ini hantu nu hiya sa nu wawa u sEnEng kya tatenga'tu.
S.PHON: u ini ħantu nu ħija sa nu wawa u sənəŋ kja tatəŋaʔ~ʡtu.
S.FORM: u ini hantu nu hiya sa nu wawa u sEnEng kya tatenga'tu.
S.PHON: u ini ħantu nu ħija sa nu wawa u sənəŋ kja tatəŋaʔ~ʡtu.
S.TRANSL: 青年真的那樣完成.
Young people did that too.

S.FORM: u ayam ku pimelawen tya tusa anu simalacacay mahizaay.
S.PHON: u ajam ku pimər~ɾawən tja tusa anu simar~ɾaʦaʦaj maħizaaj.
S.FORM: u ayam ku pimelawen tya tusa anu simalacacay mahizaay.
S.PHON: u ajam ku pimər~ɾawən tja tusa anu simar~ɾaʦaʦaj maħizaaj.
S.TRANSL: 小孩分兩個或一人一個.
Every child had one or two.

S.FORM: anu tada mahinac kya cikciken mahizaay kiza ku nika u.
S.PHON: anu tada maħinaʦ kja ʦikʦikən maħizaaj kiza ku nika u.
S.FORM: anu tada mahinac kya cikciken mahizaay kiza ku nika u.
S.PHON: anu tada maħinaʦ kja ʦikʦikən maħizaaj kiza ku nika u.
S.TRANSL: 不夠的話就再切.
If it was deficient, people would cut more.

S.FORM: kakawaw nu ini u Maibul.
S.PHON: kakawaw nu ini u maibur~ɾ.
S.FORM: kakawaw nu ini u Maibul.
S.PHON: kakawaw nu ini u maibur~ɾ.
S.TRANSL: 馬立雲的事情就是這樣.
Those were things in Maibul.

S.FORM: nihan nu maku u ta'pang nu ini u sapunis hananay sa.
S.PHON: niħan nu maku u taʔ~ʡpaŋ nu ini u sapunis ħananaj sa.
S.FORM: nihan nu maku u ta'pang nu ini u sapunis hananay sa.
S.PHON: niħan nu maku u taʔ~ʡpaŋ nu ini u sapunis ħananaj sa.
S.TRANSL: 這就是所謂的捕鳥祭的意義.
This is so called hunting festival.

S.FORM: cacay a mihiza kina cacay ya hican u ini u hiya.
S.PHON: ʦaʦaj a miħiza kina ʦaʦaj ja ħiʦan u ini u ħija.
S.FORM: cacay a mihiza kina cacay ya hican u ini u hiya.
S.PHON: ʦaʦaj a miħiza kina ʦaʦaj ja ħiʦan u ini u ħija.
S.TRANSL: 一年一次或有時候.
Once a year or sometimes

S.FORM: u selal kuyza u u tapang tu mahiniay uyza hantu u wawa malalukay misikaway mi miani tuyni u babalaki bakiaw amay uyu nikunuyan isu nimukuan isu kakuay ku mimukuay.
S.PHON: u sər~ɾar~ɾ kujza u u tapaŋ tu maħiniaj ujza ħantu u wawa mar~ɾar~ɾukaj misikawaj mi miani tujni u babar~ɾaki bakiaw amaj uju nikunujan isu nimukuan isu kakuaj ku mimukuaj.
S.FORM: u selal kuyza u u tapang tu mahiniay uyza hantu u wawa malalukay misikaway mi miani tuyni u babalaki bakiaw amay uyu nikunuyan isu nimukuan isu kakuay ku mimukuay.
S.PHON: u sər~ɾar~ɾ kujza u u tapaŋ tu maħiniaj ujza ħantu u wawa mar~ɾar~ɾukaj misikawaj mi miani tujni u babar~ɾaki bakiaw amaj uju nikunujan isu nimukuan isu kakuaj ku mimukuaj.
S.TRANSL: 勤快的小孩跟老人家說你背的你扛的都讓我來扛.
To the senior citizens, the diligent children said that we would help you carry what you carried.

S.FORM: kakuay kuyu sikaway mimukutu yu balasay nu misu u babalaki.
S.PHON: kakuaj kuju sikawaj mimukutu ju bar~ɾasaj nu misu u babar~ɾaki.
S.FORM: kakuay kuyu sikaway mimukutu yu balasay nu misu u babalaki.
S.PHON: kakuaj kuju sikawaj mimukutu ju bar~ɾasaj nu misu u babar~ɾaki.
S.TRANSL: 老人家您拿的東西讓我背讓我扛.
I would help you carry what you carried.

S.FORM: a nu misu a bai anu sa kapah kuyni u kakawaw sakai tini niyazu' kakawaw uyni pakainiay i babalaki kya sa.
S.PHON: a nu misu a bai anu sa kapaħ kujni u kakawaw sakai tini nijazuʔ~ʡ kakawaw ujni pakainiaj i babar~ɾaki kja sa.
S.FORM: a nu misu a bai anu sa kapah kuyni u kakawaw sakai tini niyazu' kakawaw uyni pakainiay i babalaki kya sa.
S.PHON: a nu misu a bai anu sa kapaħ kujni u kakawaw sakai tini nijazuʔ~ʡ kakawaw ujni pakainiaj i babar~ɾaki kja sa.
S.TRANSL: 他的行為對部落及對老人家所做的事情都很好.
His behavior was good to our tribe and senior citizens.

S.FORM: i mamelaw nu babalaki anu i tawya i pisapunisan sa E mimelaw kuyni u babalaki uyni kuyni u sasangelacay a tunuzan sa.
S.PHON: i mamər~ɾaw nu babar~ɾaki anu i tawja i pisapunisan sa ə mimər~ɾaw kujni u babar~ɾaki ujni kujni u sasaŋər~ɾaʦaj a tunuzan sa.
S.FORM: i mamelaw nu babalaki anu i tawya i pisapunisan sa E mimelaw kuyni u babalaki uyni kuyni u sasangelacay a tunuzan sa.
S.PHON: i mamər~ɾaw nu babar~ɾaki anu i tawja i pisapunisan sa ə mimər~ɾaw kujni u babar~ɾaki ujni kujni u sasaŋər~ɾaʦaj a tunuzan sa.
S.TRANSL: 老人家在捕鳥祭時會看最白的麻糬.
The senior citizens would look at the whitest rice cake.

S.FORM: tatenga' u sangelacay a tunuz sa asipabeli' i tini babalaki kuyni u sangelacay a tunuz.
S.PHON: tatəŋaʔ~ʡ u saŋər~ɾaʦaj a tunuz sa asipabər~ɾiʔ~ʡ i tini babar~ɾaki kujni u saŋər~ɾaʦaj a tunuz.
S.FORM: tatenga' u sangelacay a tunuz sa asipabeli' i tini babalaki kuyni u sangelacay a tunuz.
S.PHON: tatəŋaʔ~ʡ u saŋər~ɾaʦaj a tunuz sa asipabər~ɾiʔ~ʡ i tini babar~ɾaki kujni u saŋər~ɾaʦaj a tunuz.
S.TRANSL: 白色的麻糬是要給這裡老人家的.
The pieces of white rice cake were given to the senior citizens.

S.FORM: nimaay anu sa sa.
S.PHON: nimaaj anu sa sa.
S.FORM: nimaay anu sa sa.
S.PHON: nimaaj anu sa sa.
S.TRANSL: 有人問是誰的.
Someone asked, "whose is this?"

S.FORM: anu siwantantu hiya u ngangan kya i tatenga' asikawlah kuyza ya namisatunuzay tuyu sangelacay.
S.PHON: anu siwantantu ħija u ŋaŋan kja i tatəŋaʔ~ʡ asikawr~ɾaħ kujza ja namisatunuzaj tuju saŋər~ɾaʦaj.
S.FORM: anu siwantantu hiya u ngangan kya i tatenga' asikawlah kuyza ya namisatunuzay tuyu sangelacay.
S.PHON: anu siwantantu ħija u ŋaŋan kja i tatəŋaʔ~ʡ asikawr~ɾaħ kujza ja namisatunuzaj tuju saŋər~ɾaʦaj.
S.TRANSL: 如果確定名字的話,麻糬做的很白的人會有獎品.

TRANSL.notes: If (the senior citizens) knew the name, the people who made the whitest rice cake would be awarded.

S.TRANSL: If knew the name, the people who made the whitest rice cake would be awarded.

W.TRANSL: 過去貌=主焦-做-麻糬-名物化

S.FORM: mahiyaay kiza saka uyni hantu u ayam sa.
S.PHON: maħijaaj kiza saka ujni ħantu u ajam sa.
S.FORM: mahiyaay kiza saka uyni hantu u ayam sa.
S.PHON: maħijaaj kiza saka ujni ħantu u ajam sa.
S.TRANSL: 獎品就是鳥.
The award was the birds.

S.FORM: E ini ku babalaki ya malalukay a kapah cimaay cimaay matineng kuyni u babalaki a ma te te te.
S.PHON: ə ini ku babar~ɾaki ja mar~ɾar~ɾukaj a kapaħ ʦimaaj ʦimaaj matinəŋ kujni u babar~ɾaki a ma tə tə tə.
S.FORM: E ini ku babalaki ya malalukay a kapah cimaay cimaay matineng kuyni u babalaki a ma te te te.
S.PHON: ə ini ku babar~ɾaki ja mar~ɾar~ɾukaj a kapaħ ʦimaaj ʦimaaj matinəŋ kujni u babar~ɾaki a ma tə tə tə.
S.TRANSL: 老人知道誰是最勤勞的年輕人.
The senior citizens knew the most diligent young people.

S.FORM: caytu mamelaway nu niza tuyu u malalukay a sEnEng sa.
S.PHON: ʦajtu mamər~ɾawaj nu niza tuju u mar~ɾar~ɾukaj a sənəŋ sa.
S.FORM: caytu mamelaway nu niza tuyu u malalukay a sEnEng sa.
S.PHON: ʦajtu mamər~ɾawaj nu niza tuju u mar~ɾar~ɾukaj a sənəŋ sa.
S.TRANSL: 他們看到的勤勞的年輕人.
They saw diligent young people.

S.FORM: uyu u ayam u pulupulu' uyu tikulac kuyza u si ku si sipakawlah tuyu u malalukay mahiza i kiza.
S.PHON: uju u ajam u pur~ɾupur~ɾuʔ~ʡ uju tikur~ɾaʦ kujza u si ku si sipakawr~ɾaħ tuju u mar~ɾar~ɾukaj maħiza i kiza.
S.FORM: uyu u ayam u pulupulu' uyu tikulac kuyza u si ku si sipakawlah tuyu u malalukay mahiza i kiza.
S.PHON: uju u ajam u pur~ɾupur~ɾuʔ~ʡ uju tikur~ɾaʦ kujza u si ku si sipakawr~ɾaħ tuju u mar~ɾar~ɾukaj maħiza i kiza.
S.TRANSL: pulu-pulu' 和 tikulac當作勤勞年輕人的獎品.
pulu-pulu'and tikulac were the award for diligent people.

S.FORM: u sakalahuk sa u tunuz mamin.
S.PHON: u sakar~ɾaħuk sa u tunuz mamin.
S.FORM: u sakalahuk sa u tunuz mamin.
S.PHON: u sakar~ɾaħuk sa u tunuz mamin.
S.TRANSL: 中餐皆是麻糬.
The lunch was rice cake.

S.FORM: anu cay kataneng kuyni u hak ku tunuz kya a u hakhak.
S.PHON: anu ʦaj katanəŋ kujni u ħak ku tunuz kja a u ħakħak.
S.FORM: anu cay kataneng kuyni u hak ku tunuz kya a u hakhak.
S.PHON: anu ʦaj katanəŋ kujni u ħak ku tunuz kja a u ħakħak.
S.TRANSL: 如果麻糬不夠,就用糯米飯.
If rice cake is insufficient, they will eat glutinous rice.

S.FORM: mahizaay kiza kuyni u sakalahuk.
S.PHON: maħizaaj kiza kujni u sakar~ɾaħuk.
S.FORM: mahizaay kiza kuyni u sakalahuk.
S.PHON: maħizaaj kiza kujni u sakar~ɾaħuk.
S.TRANSL: 這就是午餐.
This was lunch.

S.FORM: uyni hantu malalukay sa maawaw ku nganga sa.
S.PHON: ujni ħantu mar~ɾar~ɾukaj sa maawaw ku ŋaŋa sa.
S.FORM: uyni hantu malalukay sa maawaw ku nganga sa.
S.PHON: ujni ħantu mar~ɾar~ɾukaj sa maawaw ku ŋaŋa sa.
S.TRANSL: 至於那個勤勞的人,他名字被叫到.
As for the diligent worker, his name was called.

S.FORM: maduba'tu miala tuyni u nipabeli' nipasisi nu hiya pakilac nuyni u nu sEnEng tuyni u babalaki sa.
S.PHON: madubaʔ~ʡtu miar~ɾa tujni u nipabər~ɾiʔ~ʡ nipasisi nu ħija pakir~ɾaʦ nujni u nu sənəŋ tujni u babar~ɾaki sa.
S.FORM: maduba'tu miala tuyni u nipabeli' nipasisi nu hiya pakilac nuyni u nu sEnEng tuyni u babalaki sa.
S.PHON: madubaʔ~ʡtu miar~ɾa tujni u nipabər~ɾiʔ~ʡ nipasisi nu ħija pakir~ɾaʦ nujni u nu sənəŋ tujni u babar~ɾaki sa.

TRANSL.notes: 跑去拿老人分給年輕人的(獎品).

S.TRANSL: 跑去拿老人分給年輕人的 .

TRANSL.notes: (They) ran to receive the award that senior citizens gave to the young people.

S.TRANSL: ran to receive the award that senior citizens gave to the young people.

S.FORM: ca'aytu kakan nuyni u babalaki kuyni kakanan nu hiya niza a lami' mamin i tini i hiya i malalukay a kapah a sipa a kawlah.
S.PHON: ʦaʔ~ʡajtu kakan nujni u babar~ɾaki kujni kakanan nu ħija niza a r~ɾamiʔ~ʡ mamin i tini i ħija i mar~ɾar~ɾukaj a kapaħ a sipa a kawr~ɾaħ.
S.FORM: ca'aytu kakan nuyni u babalaki kuyni kakanan nu hiya niza a lami' mamin i tini i hiya i malalukay a kapah a sipa a kawlah.
S.PHON: ʦaʔ~ʡajtu kakan nujni u babar~ɾaki kujni kakanan nu ħija niza a r~ɾamiʔ~ʡ mamin i tini i ħija i mar~ɾar~ɾukaj a kapaħ a sipa a kawr~ɾaħ.
S.TRANSL: 老人家也沒吃自己那一份的菜餚,全部都給勤勞的年輕人當作獎賞.
Senior citizens did not have their dishes and gave them to the diligent young people as award.

S.FORM: u namuh nu babalaki mahizaay kiza.
S.PHON: u namuħ nu babar~ɾaki maħizaaj kiza.
S.FORM: u namuh nu babalaki mahizaay kiza.
S.PHON: u namuħ nu babar~ɾaki maħizaaj kiza.
S.TRANSL: 老人家一高興,就會這樣.
Senior citizens would do this when they felt happy.

S.FORM: han nu maku kuni ka u kamu.
S.PHON: ħan nu maku kuni ka u kamu.
S.FORM: han nu maku kuni ka u kamu.
S.PHON: ħan nu maku kuni ka u kamu.
S.TRANSL: 這就是我要講的.
This was what I wanted to say.

S.FORM: tatenga' uyni hantu u hiya sa u malalukay aca nuyni u nu tatayna ya hican.
S.PHON: tatəŋaʔ~ʡ ujni ħantu u ħija sa u mar~ɾar~ɾukaj aʦa nujni u nu tatajna ja ħiʦan.
S.FORM: tatenga' uyni hantu u hiya sa u malalukay aca nuyni u nu tatayna ya hican.
S.PHON: tatəŋaʔ~ʡ ujni ħantu u ħija sa u mar~ɾar~ɾukaj aʦa nujni u nu tatajna ja ħiʦan.
S.TRANSL: 那勤勞的女性又該如何?
How about the diligent women?

S.FORM: izaw ku sausi nu babalaki tuyni u malusapakawlah tuyni u hiya.
S.PHON: izaw ku sausi nu babar~ɾaki tujni u mar~ɾusapakawr~ɾaħ tujni u ħija.
S.FORM: izaw ku sausi nu babalaki tuyni u malusapakawlah tuyni u hiya.
S.PHON: izaw ku sausi nu babar~ɾaki tujni u mar~ɾusapakawr~ɾaħ tujni u ħija.
S.TRANSL: 老人家也有打算給勤勞的婦女獎品.
Senior citizens also planed to award diligent women.

S.FORM: u kawlah sa izawtu.
S.PHON: u kawr~ɾaħ sa izawtu.
S.FORM: u kawlah sa izawtu.
S.PHON: u kawr~ɾaħ sa izawtu.
S.TRANSL: 有獎品的.
There were awards.

S.FORM: anu i tawyaay sa ca'ay kauyza u ayam ku sipakawlah tuyni u tatayna.
S.PHON: anu i tawjaaj sa ʦaʔ~ʡaj kaujza u ajam ku sipakawr~ɾaħ tujni u tatajna.
S.FORM: anu i tawyaay sa ca'ay kauyza u ayam ku sipakawlah tuyni u tatayna.
S.PHON: anu i tawjaaj sa ʦaʔ~ʡaj kaujza u ajam ku sipakawr~ɾaħ tujni u tatajna.
S.TRANSL: 那時候婦女的獎品不會是鳥.
At that time, the award for women was not bird.

S.FORM: anu uyni u sabun anu u canan.
S.PHON: anu ujni u sabun anu u ʦanan.
S.FORM: anu uyni u sabun anu u canan.
S.PHON: anu ujni u sabun anu u ʦanan.
S.TRANSL: 可以是肥皂或是其他東西.
It could be soap or something else.

S.FORM: anu pakainiay nu tatayna sa nu tatayna kuni tatayna a malukawlah.
S.PHON: anu pakainiaj nu tatajna sa nu tatajna kuni tatajna a mar~ɾukawr~ɾaħ.
S.FORM: anu pakainiay nu tatayna sa nu tatayna kuni tatayna a malukawlah.
S.PHON: anu pakainiaj nu tatajna sa nu tatajna kuni tatajna a mar~ɾukawr~ɾaħ.
S.TRANSL: 若是婦女的獎品就歸女人.
If they were women's awards, they belonged to women.

S.FORM: anu ayamay sa u tatamaay u.
S.PHON: anu ajamaj sa u tatamaaj u.
S.FORM: anu ayamay sa u tatamaay u.
S.PHON: anu ajamaj sa u tatamaaj u.
S.TRANSL: 鳥都是男生的.
Birds belonged to men.

S.FORM: mikelecay tuyni u hiya matinengay sakii tini i niyazu'.
S.PHON: mikər~ɾəʦaj tujni u ħija matinəŋaj sakii tini i nijazuʔ~ʡ.
S.FORM: mikelecay tuyni u hiya matinengay sakii tini i niyazu'.
S.PHON: mikər~ɾəʦaj tujni u ħija matinəŋaj sakii tini i nijazuʔ~ʡ.
S.TRANSL: 能夠讓部落團結
It united our tribe.

S.FORM: mihiya misimaway tu niyazu' malakapah pala tamtaw tuyni u kapah mamin tuyni u babalaki tuyni nu niyazu' anu sa sa.
S.PHON: miħija misimawaj tu nijazuʔ~ʡ mar~ɾakapaħ par~ɾa tamtaw tujni u kapaħ mamin tujni u babar~ɾaki tujni nu nijazuʔ~ʡ anu sa sa.
S.FORM: mihiya misimaway tu niyazu' malakapah pala tamtaw tuyni u kapah mamin tuyni u babalaki tuyni nu niyazu' anu sa sa.
S.PHON: miħija misimawaj tu nijazuʔ~ʡ mar~ɾakapaħ par~ɾa tamtaw tujni u kapaħ mamin tujni u babar~ɾaki tujni nu nijazuʔ~ʡ anu sa sa.
S.TRANSL: 如果這樣的話,在部落老人家讓年輕人都能成為人才.
In this way, senior citizens made the young people in the tribe outstanding.

S.FORM: uyni kuyu matatungusay sa tatenga' anu matatungustu kuyu u mihcaan a pipili'anan sa mipili'tu tuyni u tutungay nu tumuk.
S.PHON: ujni kuju matatuŋusaj sa tatəŋaʔ~ʡ anu matatuŋustu kuju u miħʦaan a pipir~ɾiʔ~ʡanan sa mipir~ɾiʔ~ʡtu tujni u tutuŋaj nu tumuk.
S.FORM: uyni kuyu matatungusay sa tatenga' anu matatungustu kuyu u mihcaan a pipili'anan sa mipili'tu tuyni u tutungay nu tumuk.
S.PHON: ujni kuju matatuŋusaj sa tatəŋaʔ~ʡ anu matatuŋustu kuju u miħʦaan a pipir~ɾiʔ~ʡanan sa mipir~ɾiʔ~ʡtu tujni u tutuŋaj nu tumuk.
S.TRANSL: 到了被選的合適年齡,就會被選為頭目.
When the young people were of proper age, one of them would be selected as leader.

S.FORM: tutungay tuyni u kucyu.
S.PHON: tutuŋaj tujni u kuʦju.
S.FORM: tutungay tuyni u kucyu.
S.PHON: tutuŋaj tujni u kuʦju.
S.TRANSL: 就像校長.
It is like principal.

S.FORM: mahizaay kuyni u lekakawa yu mahiza henay nu babalaki uyni hantu u hiya sa.
S.PHON: maħizaaj kujni u r~ɾəkakawa ju maħiza ħənaj nu babar~ɾaki ujni ħantu u ħija sa.
S.FORM: mahizaay kuyni u lekakawa yu mahiza henay nu babalaki uyni hantu u hiya sa.
S.PHON: maħizaaj kujni u r~ɾəkakawa ju maħiza ħənaj nu babar~ɾaki ujni ħantu u ħija sa.
S.TRANSL: 從前,老人家的做法就是這樣.
In the past, the senior citizens did this.

S.FORM: u i lisin hananay tuyni u sapunis sa.
S.PHON: u i r~ɾisin ħananaj tujni u sapunis sa.
S.FORM: u i lisin hananay tuyni u sapunis sa.
S.PHON: u i r~ɾisin ħananaj tujni u sapunis sa.
S.TRANSL: 這個所謂的捕鳥祭.
This is so called hunting festival.

S.FORM: tatenga' cacay a mihca kina cacay.
S.PHON: tatəŋaʔ~ʡ ʦaʦaj a miħʦa kina ʦaʦaj.
S.FORM: tatenga' cacay a mihca kina cacay.
S.PHON: tatəŋaʔ~ʡ ʦaʦaj a miħʦa kina ʦaʦaj.
S.TRANSL: 的確,一年一次.
Indeed, it is once in a year.

S.FORM: ahican i tawya maala ku tulutulu anu lima' a demiad mahiza.
S.PHON: aħiʦan i tawja maar~ɾa ku tur~ɾutur~ɾu anu r~ɾimaʔ~ʡ a dəmiad maħiza.
S.FORM: ahican i tawya maala ku tulutulu anu lima' a demiad mahiza.
S.PHON: aħiʦan i tawja maar~ɾa ku tur~ɾutur~ɾu anu r~ɾimaʔ~ʡ a dəmiad maħiza.
S.TRANSL: 在那時會用到三天甚至五天 就這樣.
At that time, it took three or five days. That's it.

S.FORM: ayza sa cacaytu a demiad.
S.PHON: ajza sa ʦaʦajtu a dəmiad.
S.FORM: ayza sa cacaytu a demiad.
S.PHON: ajza sa ʦaʦajtu a dəmiad.
S.TRANSL: 現在只有一天.
It is one day now.

S.FORM: ahican u mikuliay tu amin mahini ku sausi sa.
S.PHON: aħiʦan u mikur~ɾiaj tu amin maħini ku sausi sa.
S.FORM: ahican u mikuliay tu amin mahini ku sausi sa.
S.PHON: aħiʦan u mikur~ɾiaj tu amin maħini ku sausi sa.
S.TRANSL: 因為大家都去工作.
It is because every one had to work.

S.FORM: apuyu' hantu kuyni u hiya u sausi pakainiay i limulak.
S.PHON: apujuʔ~ʡ ħantu kujni u ħija u sausi pakainiaj i r~ɾimur~ɾak.
S.FORM: apuyu' hantu kuyni u hiya u sausi pakainiay i limulak.
S.PHON: apujuʔ~ʡ ħantu kujni u ħija u sausi pakainiaj i r~ɾimur~ɾak.
S.TRANSL: 所以就縮短慶典時間.
Therefore, they shortened celebration.

S.FORM: uyni hantu ini u Sakizaya sa niyam u Maibul uyza dada u ayam nibihkacan mahizaay.
S.PHON: ujni ħantu ini u sakizaja sa nijam u maibur~ɾ ujza dada u ajam nibiħkaʦan maħizaaj.
S.FORM: uyni hantu ini u Sakizaya sa niyam u Maibul uyza dada u ayam nibihkacan mahizaay.
S.PHON: ujni ħantu ini u sakizaja sa nijam u maibur~ɾ ujza dada u ajam nibiħkaʦan maħizaaj.
S.TRANSL: 我們馬立雲的sakizaya 人只有射鳥.
Sakizaya people in Maibul only shot birds.

S.FORM: nayay ku tudung nu hiya kutungus nu niyam u Maibul tuyni u nu Sakizaya kuyni kumud hananay mibuting nayay.
S.PHON: najaj ku tuduŋ nu ħija kutuŋus nu nijam u maibur~ɾ tujni u nu sakizaja kujni kumud ħananaj mibutiŋ najaj.
S.FORM: nayay ku tudung nu hiya kutungus nu niyam u Maibul tuyni u nu Sakizaya kuyni kumud hananay mibuting nayay.
S.PHON: najaj ku tuduŋ nu ħija kutuŋus nu nijam u maibur~ɾ tujni u nu sakizaja kujni kumud ħananaj mibutiŋ najaj.
S.TRANSL: 我們馬立雲的Sakizaya人沒有仿效大家一起去捕魚的祭典.
We Sakizaya people did not imitate others' fishing festival.

S.FORM: u ayam dada mahizaay kiza anu yadah kuyni u ayam sa yadahay kuyni u.
S.PHON: u ajam dada maħizaaj kiza anu jadaħ kujni u ajam sa jadaħaj kujni u.
S.FORM: u ayam dada mahizaay kiza anu yadah kuyni u ayam sa yadahay kuyni u.
S.PHON: u ajam dada maħizaaj kiza anu jadaħ kujni u ajam sa jadaħaj kujni u.
S.TRANSL: 只有鳥,就這樣; 如果鳥很多就也很多.
We only hunt birds; if there were many bird, we would hunt many.

S.FORM: sapabeli' tuyni u babalaki sapakan mahizaay.
S.PHON: sapabər~ɾiʔ~ʡ tujni u babar~ɾaki sapakan maħizaaj.
S.FORM: sapabeli' tuyni u babalaki sapakan mahizaay.
S.PHON: sapabər~ɾiʔ~ʡ tujni u babar~ɾaki sapakan maħizaaj.
S.TRANSL: 如果鳥很多要給老人家吃的也很多.
If there were many birds, senior citizens could eat more.

S.FORM: han ha nu maku uyni u hiya.
S.PHON: ħan ħa nu maku ujni u ħija.
S.FORM: han ha nu maku uyni u hiya.
S.PHON: ħan ħa nu maku ujni u ħija.
S.TRANSL: 我就這樣講.
I would say this.

S.FORM: u u selal misanga tu selal tulu a mihca kina cacay.
S.PHON: u u sər~ɾar~ɾ misaŋa tu sər~ɾar~ɾ tur~ɾu a miħʦa kina ʦaʦaj.
S.FORM: u u selal misanga tu selal tulu a mihca kina cacay.
S.PHON: u u sər~ɾar~ɾ misaŋa tu sər~ɾar~ɾ tur~ɾu a miħʦa kina ʦaʦaj.
S.TRANSL: 三年一次安排年齡階級.
Every three years, people rank based on their age.

S.FORM: anu tusa a mihca kina cacay misanga tuyni u selal uyni u selal sa.
S.PHON: anu tusa a miħʦa kina ʦaʦaj misaŋa tujni u sər~ɾar~ɾ ujni u sər~ɾar~ɾ sa.
S.FORM: anu tusa a mihca kina cacay misanga tuyni u selal uyni u selal sa.
S.PHON: anu tusa a miħʦa kina ʦaʦaj misaŋa tujni u sər~ɾar~ɾ ujni u sər~ɾar~ɾ sa.
S.TRANSL: 二年一次安排年齡階級.
Or people rank every two years.

S.FORM: tatenga' cima kuyni u tazikuzay nu hiya nuyni u wawa.
S.PHON: tatəŋaʔ~ʡ ʦima kujni u tazikuzaj nu ħija nujni u wawa.
S.FORM: tatenga' cima kuyni u tazikuzay nu hiya nuyni u wawa.
S.PHON: tatəŋaʔ~ʡ ʦima kujni u tazikuzaj nu ħija nujni u wawa.
S.TRANSL: 小孩誰會往後呢?
Would children retreat?

S.FORM: nayay ku tazikuzay sa.
S.PHON: najaj ku tazikuzaj sa.
S.FORM: nayay ku tazikuzay sa.
S.PHON: najaj ku tazikuzaj sa.
S.TRANSL: 沒有人往後.
Nobody would retreat.

S.FORM: satu mabililay malalukay tuyni u kawaw.
S.PHON: satu mabir~ɾir~ɾaj mar~ɾar~ɾukaj tujni u kawaw.
S.FORM: satu mabililay malalukay tuyni u kawaw.
S.PHON: satu mabir~ɾir~ɾaj mar~ɾar~ɾukaj tujni u kawaw.
S.TRANSL: 全部認真勤勞地工作.
Every one worked diligently.

S.FORM: tuyni u sakai tini nu babalaki misikaway.
S.PHON: tujni u sakai tini nu babar~ɾaki misikawaj.
S.FORM: tuyni u sakai tini nu babalaki misikaway.
S.PHON: tujni u sakai tini nu babar~ɾaki misikawaj.
S.TRANSL: 那是老人家所背負的責任.
Senior citizens united the young people.

S.FORM: nihan han nu maku kuyni u kamu hatizaay kina kamu nu maku.
S.PHON: niħan ħan nu maku kujni u kamu ħatizaaj kina kamu nu maku.
S.FORM: nihan han nu maku kuyni u kamu hatizaay kina kamu nu maku.
S.PHON: niħan ħan nu maku kujni u kamu ħatizaaj kina kamu nu maku.
S.TRANSL: 我的話就講到這.
This is what I would say.
